content: Vite 8.1.0 (latest as of 2026-06-23). For GitHub Pages: set base '/med-stock/' in vite.config.ts. Use @vitejs/plugin-react 6.0.3 for Fast Refresh. With Tailwind v4 use @tailwindcss/vite plugin instead of PostCSS. Path aliases: install @types/node, configure resolve.alias in vite.config.ts and paths in tsconfig.app.json. HashRouter is the correct choice for GitHub Pages — no 404.html redirect trick needed.
